# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We want Microsoft Rewards Bot to be a welcoming, harassment-free project for everyone — contributors and users alike, regardless of experience level or background.

## Our standards

**Encouraged:** being respectful and constructive, welcoming newcomers, accepting feedback gracefully, and focusing on what's best for the community.

**Not tolerated:** harassment, insults, discrimination, personal attacks, publishing others' private information, sharing other people's accounts or credentials, or other unprofessional conduct.

## Scope

This applies in all project spaces — GitHub issues, pull requests, discussions, and the community Discord — and when representing the project in public.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove, edit, or reject contributions and comments that violate this code, and may ban repeat or serious offenders. Report unacceptable behavior privately to the maintainers via the [Discord](https://discord.gg/JWhCkhSYtg). Reports are handled confidentially.

---

Adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1.
